rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, Sept. 7, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT DENNIS MITCHELL's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Motion to strike moot in view of demurrer ruling. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHRISTINE A CHORNEY VS. DENNIS L MITCHELL
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, Sept. 7, 2012. Line 1 - DEFENDANT DENNIS MITCHELL's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Overrule as to 1st and 3rd causes of action. Sustain with leave to amend as the 2nd cause of action to allege in good faith "outrageous conduct". =(501/REQ)
